phrases.intent_en: Which platform is the next train to Paris?
phrases.text_local: Le prochain train pour Paris part de quel quai ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh pro-SHEN trahn poor pah-REE par duh kel kay
phrases.cultural_note: Check both platform number and departure time; TER and TGV services can depart from different tracks.

phrases.intent_en: Do I need to validate this ticket before boarding?
phrases.text_local: Je dois composter ce billet avant de monter ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh dwah kom-pos-TAY suh bee-YAY ah-VON duh mon-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Validation rules depend on ticket type and operator; asking avoids penalties.

responses.english: No, it is an electronic ticket.

phrases.intent_en: Is this the right connection for Champagne-Ardenne TGV?
phrases.text_local: C'est la bonne correspondance pour Champagne-Ardenne TGV ?
phrases.pronunciation: say lah bon kor-es-pon-DONS poor sham-PANY ar-DEN tay-zhay-VAY
phrases.cultural_note: Some routes require switching between Reims centre and Champagne-Ardenne TGV station.

responses.english: Yes, it is the right platform.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the official taxi queue?
phrases.text_local: Où est la file des taxis officiels ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah feel day tak-SEE oh-fee-syel
phrases.cultural_note: Use marked taxi stands outside the station to avoid unofficial solicitations.

responses.english: At the main exit, to the right.
responses.phonetic: ah lah sor-TEE prahn-see-PAHL ah DRWAHT
responses.local: À la sortie principale, à droite.

phrases.text_local: Il y a une consigne bagages à proximité ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel yah oon kon-SEEN bah-GAZH ah prok-see-mee-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Storage options can vary by station size and day/time.

responses.english: Yes, there are lockers in the hall.
responses.phonetic: wee eel ee ah day kohn-SEE-nyuh dahn luh OHL
responses.local: Oui, il y a des consignes dans le hall.
